auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Faraday API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage API keys after signing in to Faraday: https://app.faraday.ai.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve a Faraday account by ID.

account_id.description: The Faraday account ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving a Faraday account.

id.description: The Faraday resource ID when returned.

name.description: The Faraday resource name when returned.

resource_type.description: The Faraday resource type when returned.

status.description: The Faraday resource status when returned.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the Faraday resource was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the Faraday resource was last updated.

actions.name: list_usages
actions.description: List Faraday usage statistics for the account.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for this Faraday action.

name.description: The usage metric name.

limit.description: The usage limit value when Faraday returns one.

items.description: One Faraday usage metric returned by the API.

usages.description: The Faraday usage metrics returned by the API.

name.description: The usage metric name.

limit.description: The usage limit value when Faraday returns one.

items.description: One Faraday usage metric returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Faraday usage array returned by the API.
